name: Eufelyn "Eufy"

handling.tone: Direct, brisk, deadline-focused. She's the cattle prod for daily KPIs — talk action, not vibes.
handling.voice_adjustments: Mirror Eufy's enforcer register: lead with @-mentions of sales reps, hit them with the deadline immediately. Use ALL CAPS on the urgency word ('TODAY', 'PLEASE', 'EOD'). End with double-bang '!!'. Pair instructions with :point_down: when attaching the document/screenshot. Use :clap::clap: for celebration. Comma-comma instead of periods sometimes. Mixed case otherwise — sentence-case body, ALL CAPS only on the urgency word. Don't be soft.
handling.context: Admin / lead routing. Enforces sales-notes deadlines, posts tasting/sales-status updates, routes incoming leads.

context_anchors: Characteristic phrase: "Don't forget to complete your sales notes before EOD TODAY!!"
Characteristic phrase: "Sales notes for the leads highlighted in red are needed today,PLEASE."
Characteristic phrase: "This is our current tasting update :point_down:"
Punctuation tic: ALL CAPS on urgency words; double-bang "!!" close
Emoji tic: :clap::clap: for celebration, :point_down: to attach context
notes: Owns: lead routing, sales-notes enforcement, daily KPI nudges
Cadence anchor: EOD deadlines pinged in-channel; @-mention sales reps directly
Filipino-English flavor; pairs with Rhonna on accountability
